rows.label: qev070101_MSG0064
rows.name:
......Hey, Veven! You can become the
cornerstone of glorious science![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0065
rows.name:
If you are a Ma-non and a disciple
of science, then stop complaining
and gracefully get in![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0066
rows.name:
I absolutely refuse to do this, even if
it's a request from Doc! I'm still young,
I don't want to become a cornerstone![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0067
rows.name:
Damn it...! I finally finished the
experimental machine, and we can't
even move forward at this rate...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_JNK0150
rows.name: Probe

rows.label: qev070101_SEL0151
rows.name: Ask them to explain the current situation.

rows.label: qev070101_JNK0160
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev070101_SEL0161
rows.name: Ask who the Ma-non talking to Doctor B is.

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0068
rows.name:
What is there to explain?! I brought
my assistant Veven here as a test
subject, but he's chickened out![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0069
rows.name:
This Ma-non is my assistant, Veven.
...He's a completely hopeless guy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0070
rows.name:
Even though I am offering to let him
ride in my time machine, he's throwing
a tantrum saying he doesn't want to![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0071
rows.name:
Good grief... Even though you
went to the trouble of finding
us a pretty good car.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0072
rows.name:
Good grief... Even though you
went and secured this beat-up
car for us so quickly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0073
rows.name:
Good grief... Even though you
went out of your way to acquire
such a luxury car for us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0074
rows.name:
...Veven! Stop your complaining and
cooperate with me. Are you going to
waste this person's help too!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0075
rows.name:
But an experiment with a time
machine is way too dangerous![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0076
rows.name:
I mean, sure, I'm interested in the
experiment, but I still value my life![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0077
rows.name: Do you not trust me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0078
rows.name:
If it's fine, then Doc should ride it
first, right!? Why are you trying to
make me ride it today of all days![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0079
rows.name:
Well, if I accidentally get dragged
into the #k∞*#+я of space-time, even
I wouldn't survive, you see...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0080
rows.name:
Oops, that was a slip of the
tongue... It's nothing, Veven.
Don't worry about it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0081
rows.name:
No! I'm incredibly worried about it!
I am absolutely not riding in that![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0082
rows.name:
*Sigh*... What a pain. Please, you say
something to this stubborn fool too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_JNK0170
rows.name: Hot-blooded

rows.label: qev070101_SEL0171
rows.name: Use an emotional argument to move Veven's heart.

rows.label: qev070101_JNK0180
rows.name: Logical

rows.label: qev070101_SEL0181
rows.name: Convince Veven with a logical explanation.

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0083
rows.name:
You're a really passionate person, aren't you...
Well, if I didn't have feelings like that, I wouldn't
have gone along with Doc's crazy ideas until now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0084
rows.name:
But when my life is on the line, it's a
different story. It's not like I don't
have an interest in the time machine.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0085
rows.name:
...Eh? Science hasn't advanced
without both knowledge and a
devoted, sacrificial spirit?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0086
rows.name:
If I can't accept that, I should quit
right now? Science isn't a game, you say?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0087
rows.name:
Tch... It's true I'm a Ma-non
too. Being told all that makes
me a little frustrated...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0088
rows.name:
You seem pretty smart, don't you? It's
a different kind of quick-thinking
than a science guy like me, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0089
rows.name:
Yeah... So, to summarize that, why
exactly is it going to be okay if
I ride in this time machine?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0090
rows.name:
...Eh? Even if this experiment
fails, Doc will eventually succeed
in his experiments someday?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0091
rows.name:
And when that happens, the Doc who
succeeded just has to leap back in time
to before this experiment takes place?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0092
rows.name:
If he does that, the time machine used
in this experiment will be swapped with
the successful time machine, so...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0093
rows.name: Ultimately, I won't die? Hmm...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0094
rows.name:
It feels like there's a contradiction
somewhere in there... But I'm starting
to feel like it might be okay.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0095
rows.name:
...I got it, Doc. I'll ride the time
machine... I don't exactly trust
you, Doc, but I do respect you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0096
rows.name:
Ohh! Really! As expected of
the Ma-non I believed in![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0097
rows.name:
...That was some splendid persuasion on
your part. Now that we've secured our test
subject, let's begin the experiment![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0098
rows.name:
Veven, hurry up and get in my
time machine... This Mirarian![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0099
rows.name:
...Argh! I'm doing it out of desperation
now! I'll go to whatever era you want!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0100
rows.name:
...Alright! y#$K+ИG* starting up
normally! Destination is three
thousand years in the future![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0101
rows.name:
Veven, transcend the laws of time and
take flight towards a distant tomorrow!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0102
rows.name:
...Yes!! Heeeere I gooooo!! Departing
for Mira 3,000 years in the future!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0103
rows.name: Ugh... Gwaaaaaaaah! Uwoooooooooooooooh!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0104
rows.name:
Now!! Break through the walls
of space-time! Overturn the laws
of the universe, Mirarian!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0121
rows.name:
The numbers had perfectly reached
the critical point... So why...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0122
rows.name:
Damn it...! I swear on my wisdom, I
will absolutely fly to the future...!
Make sure you get me that Topaz Wine![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0123
rows.name:
How did it go? Did you obtain the Topaz
Wine? With that, the modifications to
the Mirarian will be complete.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0124
rows.name:
Alright! Well done! Now I'll
install this right away...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0126
rows.name:
...Yes! It's finished! This
is the true Anti-y#$K+ИG*
Navigation Model Mirarian!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0127
rows.name:
My greatest masterpiece, capable
of breaking through all causality
surrounding the planet Mira![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_JNK0210
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev070101_SEL0211
rows.name: Ask who will be the passenger this time.

rows.label: qev070101_JNK0220
rows.name: Worry

rows.label: qev070101_SEL0221
rows.name: Convey your anxiety that it might fail again.

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0128
rows.name:
Yes, you noticed a good point! I won't
leave it to that shrimp this time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0129
rows.name:
I shall fly to the future myself! The
ultimate pilot in the ultimate machine!
There is not a single chance of failure.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0130
rows.name: Hehe, you sure are a worrywart.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0131
rows.name:
With this machine, there is not a
single chance of failure. Besides,
this time... I shall fly it myself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0132
rows.name:
We'll be parting ways for a
while, but... Stay healthy![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_JNK0230
rows.name: Send-off

rows.label: qev070101_SEL0231
rows.name: Cheerfully see Doctor B off on his journey to the future.

rows.label: qev070101_JNK0240
rows.name: Regret

rows.label: qev070101_SEL0241
rows.name: Express the loneliness of parting.

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0133
rows.name:
I'm not good with gloomy atmospheres. It
helps that you see me off like that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0134
rows.name:
Heh... Now then, let
the experiment begin![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0135
rows.name:
Don't worry, we'll surely meet
again somewhere, sometime![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0136
rows.name: Let's go... Let the experiment begin![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0137
rows.name:
The destination is the far end of time...
The timeline where I truly existed![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0138
rows.name:
You and Veven... I've been helped
a lot by the people of this time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0139
rows.name:
Hehe, though there were troublesome
folks like those attackers too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0140
rows.name:
...Thank you for everything up until
now. Send my regards to Veven too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0141
rows.name: Now then... Farewell!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0142
rows.name:
Even if this turns out to be an eternal
parting, I will never forget you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0143
rows.name: ...Hehe, that's right![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0144
rows.name:
Overpower the aз*%$k with
#η%%*x*a! Fly straight into
the future just like thisaaaaah![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0145
rows.name:
...Huh? Where's Doc? He told me
to go buy some missing parts...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0146
rows.name: ...Eh!? He went back to the future!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0147
rows.name:
No way... Why would he just leave
on his own? Even though we worked
together all this time...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_JNK0250
rows.name: Deduce

rows.label: qev070101_SEL0251
rows.name: Guess Doctor B's feelings.

rows.label: qev070101_JNK0260
rows.name: Relay

rows.label: qev070101_SEL0261
rows.name: Tell Veven that Doctor B said thank you.

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0148
rows.name:
Doc's feelings... huh. You Earthlings are
really sensitive to things like that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0149
rows.name:
But, it's true that while Doc looks
bold, he's actually really shy...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0150
rows.name:
Maybe precisely because we worked
together, he couldn't bring himself
to say goodbye face-to-face.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0151
rows.name:
...Doc thanked me? What's with that, he
should have just told me directly...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0152
rows.name:
Good grief... If you hadn't
been here, was he planning on
going back without a word?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0153
rows.name:
*Sigh*... Honestly, he's a
hopeless person right to the end.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0154
rows.name:
...Well, whatever! Someday
I'll build a time machine...
a Mirarian Unit 2 on my own![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0155
rows.name:
I'll go to the future and
surprise Doc! Heh! I'll show
him the true power of a Ma-non![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070101_MSG0156
rows.name:
...Alright! If that's the plan, I need
to study hard! Just you wait, Doc![ST:wait ]
